description: Style Note This summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DetailsYellow top with round neckline with brown coloured binding, yoke with lace detail in the front and the back, is sleeveless with brown binding, gathering pattern from the yoke and an elasticated hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in warm waterDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowUse warm ironSize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
